auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Vapi API key used with the Authorization Bearer header.

actions.name: create_analytics_query
actions.description: Create and execute one or more Vapi analytics queries across call and subscription data.

items.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

name.description: The query name returned by the analytics request.

items.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

rows.description: A list of raw Vapi objects.

result.description: A raw JSON value returned by Vapi.

items.description: A Vapi analytics query result.

results.description: The analytics results returned by Vapi.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_assistant
actions.description: Create a new Vapi assistant with required transcriber, voice, and model settings plus optional messaging and duration controls.

model.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

voice.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

transcriber.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

firstMessage.description: The first message the assistant should say.

systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that controls assistant behavior.

items.description: A string item.
A string item.

maxDurationSeconds.description: The maximum call duration in seconds.

voicemailDetection.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

id.description: The unique identifier of the assistant.

orgId.description: The organization identifier that owns the assistant.

model.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

voice.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

metadata.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

transcriber.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

updatedAt.description: When the assistant was last updated.

firstMessage.description: The first message spoken by the assistant.

outputSchema.description: The assistant created by Vapi.

actions.name: create_eval
actions.description: Create a Vapi eval for a mock conversation and define the checkpoint messages used to evaluate model behavior.

items.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

messages.description: The mock conversation and evaluation messages.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The eval created by Vapi.

actions.name: create_openai_chat
actions.description: Create an OpenAI-compatible Vapi chat response using an assistant or squad, with optional session and transport settings.

items.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

anyOf.description: A list of raw Vapi objects.

input.description: The input text or messages for the chat.

squad.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

stream.description: Whether Vapi should stream the response. This connector only supports false.

squadId.description: The identifier of an existing squad.

assistant.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

sessionId.description: The identifier of an existing session.

transport.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

assistantId.description: The identifier of an existing assistant.

previousChatId.description: The previous chat identifier used as conversation context.

assistantOverrides.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

id.description: The unique identifier of the OpenAI-compatible response.

output.description: A raw JSON value returned by Vapi.

error.description: The response error message, when present.

outputSchema.description: The OpenAI-compatible response returned by Vapi.

actions.name: create_phone_number
actions.description: Create a Vapi phone number using Vapi, Twilio, Vonage, Telnyx, or bring-your-own provider settings.

name.description: The display name of the phone number.

number.description: The E.164 phone number, when the provider requires one.

sipUri.description: The SIP URI used by Vapi-managed SIP numbers.

squadId.description: The squad identifier attached to the phone number.

smsEnabled.description: Whether SMS is enabled for the phone number.

workflowId.description: The workflow identifier attached to the phone number.

assistantId.description: The assistant identifier attached to the phone number.

credentialId.description: The credential identifier used by the phone provider.

numberDesiredAreaCode.description: The desired area code when Vapi provisions a number automatically.

numberE164CheckEnabled.description: Whether E.164 validation should be enforced.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

id.description: The unique identifier of the phone number.

name.description: The display name of the phone number.

provider.description: The provider that manages the phone number.

status.description: The phone number status reported by Vapi.

assistantId.description: The assistant identifier attached to the phone number.

workflowId.description: The workflow identifier attached to the phone number.

squadId.description: The squad identifier attached to the phone number.

createdAt.description: When the phone number was created.

updatedAt.description: When the phone number was last updated.

outputSchema.description: The phone number created by Vapi.

actions.name: create_policy
actions.description: Create a Vapi monitoring policy with severity, threshold, and schedule or interval configuration.

interval.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

schedule.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

severity.description: The severity level of the policy.

threshold.description: A raw JSON object returned by Vapi.

items.description: A string item.

updatedAt.description: When the policy was last updated.

outputSchema.description: The monitoring policy created by Vapi.

actions.name: create_provider_resource
actions.description: Create a pronunciation dictionary provider resource in Vapi, defaulting to the 11labs pronunciation-dictionary route used by the upstream toolkit.
